arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou explains why he loves watching Lucas Bergvall, Gray and Odobert in training
arts.sum: While all five teenagers come with bags of ability and excitement surrounding them, how does the Tottenham head coach marry the process of developing them all with the need to bring success to the club in the short-term and end that 16-year trophy drought at the north London outfit? Spurs had three new teenagers arrive into their first team this summer in Lucas Bergvall, Archie Gray and Wilson Odobert, signed for a combined £78.5million between them, while Yang Min-hyeok and Luka Vuskovic will join up Postecoglou's squad next year to continue the conveyor belt of talent coming into the club.

arts.ttl: ‘Perfect signing’: Tim Sherwood says £60m player would’ve really helped James Maddison at Tottenham
arts.sum: Tottenham have started poorly this season, and questions are starting to be asked of Spurs. Indeed, Ange Postecoglou’s side seem to have lost something this...

arts.ttl: ‘Out on his feet’: Tim Sherwood says £12m Arsenal player looked absolutely exhausted vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Arsenal beat Tottenham 1-0 at the weekend with what has become a trademark dogged performance from Mikel Arteta’s side. The Gunners dug in deep to...

arts.ttl: A Tottenham therapy session: Ange Postecoglou, Spurs' tier-3 status and the battle of a lifetime
arts.sum: Speaking to the press post-match, Postecoglou cut a particularly grizzly figure, reasserting that he 'always' wins trophies in his second season with a club. After ten games of the 2023/24 Premier League season, Tottenham Hotspur had hailed Ange Postecoglou as their outback overlord.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer calls out three Tottenham stars to help Dominic Solanke find best form

arts.ttl: Report: Champions League giant now want £17m Tottenham player and he’s tempted to leave
We simulated Coventry City vs Tottenham to get a Carabao Cup score forecast
arts.sum: After suffering north London derby heartbreak, Tottenham will be looking to return to winning ways when they take on Coventry City in the Carabao Cup third round. Gabriel scored the only goal of the game as Arsenal beat Spurs 1-0 at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, handing Ange Postecoglou's side a second league defeat of the season after just four games.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham have put plans in place to address big situation developing involving £43m star
arts.sum: Tottenham have put plans in place to open talks over a new contract for Cristian Romero amid interest from Real Madrid.
